layer_definition.name: Architectural Layer
layer_definition.role: Spatial, environmental, and experiential foundation of the brand system
layer_definition.purpose: Represents architecture, space, material neutrality, and visual breathing room
layer_definition.perception_goal: Create architectural intelligence, spatial clarity, and calm structural environment

core_colors.name: Architectural Ivory
core_colors.psychology: Clarity, openness, architectural neutrality, spatial calm

core_colors.name: Warm Architectural Gray
core_colors.psychology: Material realism, architectural warmth, grounded structure

core_colors.name: Pure Spatial White
core_colors.role: Maximum clarity and negative space color

usage_principles.dominance_rule: Architectural layer defines spatial experience, not structural hierarchy
usage_principles.space_rule: Whitespace is considered architectural space, not empty design area
usage_principles.balance_rule: Must always support engineering layer without competing with it

system_behavior.ui: Defines background surfaces and spatial composition
system_behavior.layout: Creates breathing room and architectural structure perception
system_behavior.visual_identity: Provides architectural calmness behind engineering authority

user_feeling: This feels like an architectural system, not a product catalog
This space is designed with intention and structure
